entities.schema_notes: A PDF file created by merging multiple PDF files.
Individual PDF files created by splitting pages from an input PDF.
A PDF file with pages rotated by 90 degrees.
An Excel file containing tables extracted from a PDF.
A PDF file created with basic text and graphics using reportlab.
A multi-page PDF report created using reportlab.
A text file containing extracted text from a PDF.
A PDF file containing pages 1-5 extracted from an input PDF.
A PDF file containing pages 6-10 extracted from an input PDF.
A PDF file decrypted from an encrypted PDF.
A PDF file with a watermark applied to all pages.
A PDF file encrypted with user and owner passwords.
Contains form field information including page number, bounding boxes, and entry text.
entities.source_text: Create a file named `fields.json` with information for the form fields and bounding boxes in this format:

entities.schema_notes: Contains values to be entered for each form field, including field ID, description, page number, and value.
entities.source_text: Create a `field_values.json` file in this format with the values to be entered for each field:

workflow_steps.description: Detect fillable form fields in the input PDF
workflow_steps.source_text: If you need to fill out a PDF form, first check to see if the PDF has fillable form fields. Run this script from this file's directory: `python scripts/check_fillable_fields <file.pdf>`

workflow_steps.description: Extract form field information from the PDF
workflow_steps.source_text: Run this script from this file's directory: `python scripts/extract_form_field_info.py <input.pdf> <field_info.json>`

workflow_steps.description: Convert PDF to PNG images for each page
workflow_steps.source_text: Convert the PDF to PNGs (one image for each page) with this script (run from this file's directory): `python scripts/convert_pdf_to_images.py <file.pdf> <output_directory>`

workflow_steps.description: Analyze images to determine the purpose of each form field
workflow_steps.source_text: Then analyze the images to determine the purpose of each form field (make sure to convert the bounding box PDF coordinates to image coordinates).

workflow_steps.description: Create field_values.json with values to be entered for each field
workflow_steps.source_text: Create a `field_values.json` file in this format with the values to be entered for each field

workflow_steps.description: Fill fillable fields in the PDF using field_values.json
workflow_steps.source_text: Run the `fill_fillable_fields.py` script from this file's directory to create a filled-in PDF

workflow_steps.description: Perform visual analysis to identify form fields and bounding boxes
workflow_steps.source_text: Carefully examine each PNG image and identify all form fields and areas where the user should enter data.

workflow_steps.description: Create fields.json with form field information and bounding boxes
workflow_steps.source_text: Create a file named `fields.json` with information for the form fields and bounding boxes

workflow_steps.description: Create validation images showing bounding boxes
workflow_steps.source_text: Create validation images by running this script from this file's directory for each page

workflow_steps.description: Validate bounding boxes using automated and manual checks
workflow_steps.source_text: Verify that none of bounding boxes intersect and that the entry bounding boxes are tall enough by checking the fields.json file with the `check_bounding_boxes.py` script

workflow_steps.description: Add annotations to the PDF using fields.json
workflow_steps.source_text: Run this script from this file's directory to create a filled-out PDF using the information in fields.json

Convert PDF to PNG images for each page

Fill fillable fields in the PDF using field_values.json

alternative_flows.source_text: If the PDF doesn't have fillable form fields

commands: Correct the appropriate fields and try again
exception_flows.source_text: This script will verify that the field IDs and values you provide are valid; if it prints error messages, correct the appropriate fields and try again.

commands: Iterate until there are no remaining errors
exception_flows.source_text: If there are errors, reanalyze the relevant fields, adjust the bounding boxes, and iterate until there are no remaining errors.
